title: Tez: 13. Gece
overview: Gamze moved to a student with psychological problems called Narin at the suggestion of her boyfriend Emre and she is studying in the field of clinical psychology. Gaye chooses Narin as the subject of her school's thesis and starts to shoot the sessions with the camera. Looking at the camera records, Gaye was only able to shoot 13 nights. There has been no news from Gaye since.
